transcription.text: Forget about fingers and toes. I'm here to talk about bums. How do you look after your bum? I use wipes and toilet paper on a normal basis. Why? Because they feel cleaner. I don't know what that is. Are those the... These are wipes. You can't have one without the other. Bonnie and Clyde. Yeah. They go together. Would you use these? I would, absolutely. If you don't have a clean bum, what do you have? I feel the clean so fresh it can only be...
